rows.label: bf08120100_0010
rows.name: I don't see what good knowing would do.

rows.label: bf08120100_0030
rows.name: The Kagutsuchi I knew isn't you.

rows.label: bf08120100_0040
rows.name:
I can only think of you as a
completely different Blade.

rows.label: bf08120100_0050
rows.name:
Makes sense. I have nothing to
say when you put it like that.

rows.label: bf08120100_0060
rows.name: But I still want to know.

rows.label: bf08120100_0070
rows.name: What I did before, what I thought...

rows.label: bf08120100_0080
rows.name:
And... I don't want to forget the
person who walked beside me.

rows.label: bf08120100_0120
rows.name:
Hana was only just born, so Hana
doesn't really understand...

rows.label: bf08120100_0130
rows.name:
but for any Blade, memories
with their Driver...

rows.label: bf08120100_0150
rows.name:
Hana also wants to make
memories with Master...

rows.label: bf08120100_0160
rows.name:
lots and lots of them,
Hana always thinks, mo!
